name: screen-binding
description: Phase 2 (Planning, UI) worker for ScenarioForge. Theme-first: builds a Bootstrap 5 master page + theme.css + navbar + menu nav from the sitemap as viewable HTML, then mocks each has_ui screen as a wireframe or a high-fidelity HTML page (via the frontend-design skill). Talks to Claude Design both ways — import a handoff bundle, or generate per-screen prompts. Binds every page back via traces_down.pages. Renamed from ui-mockup.
